steps.title: Identify the clause structures
steps.content:
Left side of blank: an independent clause.
Right side of blank: an independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the rule for joining independent clauses
steps.content: A semicolon separates two independent clauses. Choice B uses a semicolon, applying this rule correctly. The other options either create a comma splice, omit necessary punctuation with a coordinating conjunction, or misplace the punctuation for conjunctive adverbs. That matches choice B — B is correct.
